creator: miguelmclara@gmail.com
text:
I'm not sure in which version of the port this stared but the issue is still present in the latest version (Version 45.0.2454.85).


Its working on all other Laptops (Windows/linux) and smapthones.

I'm also not sure how to debug this it simple just doesn't find any device but there's no error.

Just tested and while windows 10 chrome shows the device, FreeBSD chromium does not.

Any ideas?
